The [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]] '''Model A-Fac 333''' was a factory model used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
One of the largest and most expensive building models ever produced by Delvin Constructs, the A-Fac 333 could be tooled to produce almost any common large vehicle design, but the Empire used them almost exclusively for their [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] and [[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AA]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]]. The Empire chose the A-Fac 333 after discovering that the original design chosen, the Delvin Constructs [[Model Fac H-121]], could not provide the level of attention such advanced vehicles required.
